CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Bi-Rite Restaurant Supply's application for right to attach order and writ of attachment.
The application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
